articles.title: Six fishermen missing after boat capsizes off Visakhapatnam coast
articles.sum: "One fisherman has been rescued by a cruise ship, while search operations are underway for the remaining six," Vizag Fishing Boats Association president Lakshman Rao told PTI

articles.title: Operative behind recce of Ram temple and RSS HQ, Hafiz Saeed's relative in designated terrorist list
articles.sum: All 23 of them were designated as terrorist under fourth schedule of the Unlawful Activities (Prevention) Act (UAPA)

articles.title: ‘Capital punishment warranted’: Ram Mandir Trust member on Ayodhya donation row
articles.sum: A Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust member has endorsed the administration's decisive action in the alleged Ram Mandir donation embezzlement case, calling for severe penalties for the guilty. The ongoing SIT probe has led to arrests and resignations, with investigators sc...

articles.title: Shri Krishna Janmabhoomi-Shahi Idgah dispute: Hindu side attends Lok Adalat, proposes relocation of mosque
articles.sum: A special Lok Adalat in Mathura aimed for an amicable resolution in the Shri Krishna Janmabhoomi-Shahi Idgah Mosque dispute, with Hindu plaintiffs attending conciliation proceedings. The Hindu side proposed relocating the mosque structure to an alternative site if the Muslim part...

articles.title: 'Irreplaceable loss to art and culture': PM Modi mourns demise of Pandavani singer Teejan Bai
articles.sum: Renowned Pandavani singer Teejan Bai has passed away, leaving an irreplaceable void in the world of art and culture. Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Chhattisgarh Chief Minister Vishnu Deo Sai paid glowing tributes, highlighting her immense contribution to popularizing the tradit...

articles.title: Inquiry report against Justice Varma will be tabled this session: Om Birla
articles.sum: Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla confirmed the report on corruption charges against Justice Yashwant Varma will be presented in the monsoon session, despite his resignation. The House will decide the next steps after the report's tabling, which could happen on the session's first day. ...

articles.title: Govt sends notice to Telegram over pirated films, shows
articles.sum: Authorities have issued a stern notice to Telegram, demanding proactive measures against the rampant circulation of pirated films and shows. The government insists the messaging app must go beyond individual channel takedowns and implement robust systems to detect and remove infr...

articles.title: Monsoon session from July 20, govt hopes to push key bills in Parliament
articles.sum: The government aims to reintroduce its ambitious women's reservation bill in the upcoming monsoon session after a previous defeat. Speaker Om Birla's decision on defecting MPs could bolster the ruling alliance's numbers. Discussions are also expected on potential changes to the b...

articles.title: India bucking trend by adding refining capacity: PM Modi
articles.sum: Amidst global energy turmoil, India, under PM Modi's leadership, bolstered domestic LPG output and secured diverse crude supplies. Strategic diplomacy and policy interventions successfully shielded citizens from potential shortages and price surges. The inauguration of the HPCL R...

articles.title: Zuma showing South Africa 'middle finger' by meeting Gupta brother - minister
articles.sum: Former President Zuma's trip to India reignites anger over a decade-old corruption scandal.

articles.title: What news reports from 1600s tell us about life in Mughal India
articles.sum: Thousands of forgotten news reports are reshaping our understanding of Aurangzeb and the Mughal world.
